summary: Iteration 3 frontend-only validation of CASNAGGI redesign: (1) /impact Strategic Plan + Projected 2035 sections and (2) new /events/:slug detail pages. All acceptance criteria met on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). No console errors, no broken images, all 9 event slugs render, invalid slug redirects to /events, prev/next loops and scrolls to top, related-events always renders exactly 3.

impact_page.strategic-plan section: present with 3 phase cards (2025-2027 Foundation, 2028-2030 Expansion, 2031-2035 Nationwide Scale), numbered badges 01/02/03, 4 checklist goals each (verified via inner_text)
impact_page.projected-2035 section: present on terracotta bg, 5 numbered target lines (projected-0..4), Fund-the-roadmap -> /donate and Partner-with-us -> /get-involved CTAs verified

event_detail_pages.routing: /events/:slug route works; featured card and all 8 grid cards are Link elements that navigate to detail
event_detail_pages.hero: event-hero, event-back (ALL EVENTS), category overline, large title, date, location, tags — all present
event_detail_pages.body: event-body with sticky sidebar (event-stat-0/1/2) + event-share button; main column shows excerpt, event-paragraph-0..2, tag chips
event_detail_pages.prev_next_loop: From cash-gifts-nobis-hall-jalingo (index 0): prev -> cac-registration (last), next -> community-relief-taraba. ScrollY after clicking next = 0 (useEffect scrollTo verified).
event_detail_pages.related_events: Always exactly 3 cards; for Humanitarian Care event we saw 2 same-category (community-relief-taraba, free-medical-outreach-minna-yenagoa) + 1 filler (youth-governance-forum)
event_detail_pages.broken images: none on all 3 tested detail pages

tests_performed.mobile_390x844: event detail (hero/body/nav/related) and /impact (strategic-plan, projected-2035) all visible and render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: document.title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' across all routes — not a regression and out of scope, but consider adding per-page <title> for SEO later.
EventDetail.jsx handles missing event.story/event.stats with (event.story || []) / (event.stats || []) — safe defaults, good.
Share button gracefully falls back to clipboard if navigator.share is unavailable — good UX.
Related events logic prioritizes same-category then fills from other categories, slicing to 3 — matches spec and always renders exactly 3 on a 9-event dataset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully passes. EVENTS array has 9 entries; featured (index 0) is rendered outside the grid in Events.jsx — so data-testid 'event-cash-gifts-nobis-hall-jalingo' intentionally does not exist in the grid (featured uses 'events-featured-link'). useEffect scroll-to-top requires a small wait (~500-800ms) after SPA route change before asserting window.scrollY.
